name: 甜蜜收束型（大團圓婚禮）
description: 全劇以盛大婚禮和深情誓言結尾，所有矛盾解決、反派伏法、身份揭露完成。給觀眾完整的情感閉環和滿足感，同時男主跪地求原諒和全部身家轉讓製造最後的甜蜜高潮。

examples.drama_title: On her first day, the cleaning girl defied the CEO, expecting to be fired—but he proposed to her!
examples.excerpt: No matter if life brings success or temporary setbacks, happiness or sadness, are you both willing to stand by each other's side, to support, to accompany, to share each moment and spend your lives together? I do.
